---
name: Security review
about: Report public security-process, verification, disclosure, or hardening concerns
title: "[Security Review]: "
labels: security-review
assignees: ""
---

## Scope

Select the area being reviewed:

- [ ] Release verification guidance
- [ ] Trusted fingerprint guidance
- [ ] Hash/checksum documentation
- [ ] Public security page wording
- [ ] Responsible disclosure process
- [ ] Public hardening recommendation
- [ ] Other

## Summary

Describe the public security-process concern clearly.

## Why It Matters

Explain the risk or confusion without exposing sensitive exploitation details.

## Suggested Improvement

Describe the recommended correction or hardening step.

## Sensitive Information Check

Do not include active exploit details, private keys, passwords, tokens, production secrets, confidential files, or regulated data.

- [ ] This report does not disclose sensitive vulnerability details publicly.
- [ ] This report does not include secrets or confidential data.
